name: Generate Site
simple_explanation: This script is part of the Phase 1 analysis pipeline. It scans the target repository and outputs structured JSON that feeds into the final site generator.
detailed_explanation: Accepts a repo path as first CLI argument. Uses only Python standard library — no pip installs. Outputs valid JSON to stdout with a _token_estimate field tracking how close it is to its budget. Errors are handled gracefully: binary files are skipped, encoding errors fall back to utf-8 with replace.
